header.description: Route items depending on defined expression or rules

rules.description: Build a matching rule for each output

expression.description: Write an expression to return the output index

output.description: The output index to send the input item to. Use an expression to calculate which input item should be routed to which output. The expression must return a number.

outputKey.description: The label of output to which to send data to if rule matches
The label of output to which to send data to if rule matches

looseTypeValidation.description: If the type of an expression doesn't match the type of the comparison, n8n will try to cast the expression to the required type. E.g. for booleans "false" or 0 will be cast to false

fallbackOutput.description: If no rule matches the item will be sent to this output, by default they will be ignored

ignoreCase.description: Whether to ignore letter case when evaluating conditions

looseTypeValidation.description: If the type of an expression doesn't match the type of the comparison, n8n will try to cast the expression to the required type. E.g. for booleans "false" or 0 will be cast to false

allMatchingOutputs.displayName: Send data to all matching outputs
allMatchingOutputs.description: Whether to send data to all outputs meeting conditions (and not just the first one)
